content: Browsers block audio until a user gesture; AudioContext created outside a gesture starts 'suspended' and needs resume() inside a click/keypress. Games should start audio after an explicit interaction (title-screen click/keypress works). Provide user control: mute toggle at minimum, ideally volume slider; persist the setting. Sources: MDN autoplay guide, Chrome developers web-audio-autoplay blog, MDN Web Audio best practices (official docs, cross-confirmed).
